cards.front: What is the purpose of color transformation in image processing?
cards.back: To change the color space of an image from one model to another, such as converting RGB to HSV or YUV
A technique used to reduce the noise in an image by averaging neighboring pixels

cards.front: What is the difference between sharpening and smoothing in color image processing?
cards.back: Sharpening increases the contrast and details in an image, while smoothing reduces noise and blurs the image
A technique used to display and process color images in grayscale, by converting colors to different shades of gray

cards.front: What type of noise affects color images?
cards.back: Both additive and multiplicative noise can affect color images, but additive noise is more common and affects the brightness of colors
